title: Artwork Versions
description: Tracks the current release version for each ublue-os/artwork package. Renovate monitors this file to detect new upstream releases.

versions.description: Map of wallpaper package name to its current release date version (YYYY-MM-DD).

bluefin-wallpapers.description: Version of the bluefin-v* release tag (date portion).

bluefin-wallpapers-extra.description: Version of the bluefin-extra-v* release tag (date portion).

aurora-wallpapers.description: Version of the aurora-v* release tag (date portion).

bazzite-wallpapers.description: Version of the bazzite-v* release tag (date portion).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was last updated.
